zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Samon於大約1372年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，她的父親John Samon28歲，母親Agnes Pryde24歲。她於大約1393年與John de Southwell V在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年之後在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Samon于大约1372年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾安斯利时，她的父亲John Samon28岁，母亲Agnes Pryde24岁。她于大约1393年与John de Southwell V在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年之后在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Samon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Marcel, Nicolle, Serge.  Spanish Alberto, Aurelio, Dionisio, Elvira, Fernando, Florentino, Jose, Orlando.  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Francesca, Francesco, Gennaro, Mauro.
French: habitational name from any of several places called Salon(s), for example in Dordogne and Bouches-du-Rhône.
Perhaps an Americanized form of Italian   Salone  .

variants.name: Salone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Blanchard, Pierre.
African American: if not of French origin (see 3 below), then perhaps an altered form of Irish and Scottish Gaelic   Sloan  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Samon was born about 1372, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, John Samon, was 28 and her mother, Agnes Pryde, was 24. She married John de Southwell V about 1393, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1425, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

Elle est décédée après 1425, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Samonが約1372年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父John Samonは28歳，母Agnes Prydeは24歳であった。約1393年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでJohn de Southwell Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年以後にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Samon(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Samon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Pryde(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 John de Southwell V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 이후 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Samon родилась около 1372 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Samon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Pryde, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Southwell V около 1393 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1425 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.
